summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Parser Integration Layer with antiblock protection. All core ingestion endpoints working correctly. Copart/IAAI runners are placeholders as expected.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior - placeholder API with no real data source
Expected behavior - placeholder API with no real data source

passed_tests: VIN validation correctly rejecting invalid VINs
VIN deduplication working (same VIN updates existing vehicle)
POST /api/ingestion/parser/batch - batch import working (2 created, 1 skipped)
GET /api/ingestion/health - health dashboard working with 2 parsers
All vehicle management endpoints working (list, stats, makes, models, by ID, by VIN)
Vehicle status updates and CRM linking working
Raw data retrieval and reprocessing working
Activity logging working (16 vehicle activities found)
Dashboard integration working (vehicles section shows stats)
